scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w engine && npm run typecheck -w app
scripts.private:import-all: npm run cards:import -- --input private-card-data/imperium_cards_private.csv --output generated-private/cards.normalized.json --report generated-private/card-import-report.json && npm run nations:import -- --cards generated-private/cards.normalized.json --input private-card-data/imperium_nations_private.csv --output generated-private/nations.normalized.json --report generated-private/nation-import-report.json
